diagrams.title: Clipping Window with Line Segment
diagrams.description: Shows a rectangular clipping window with an arbitrary line segment passing through it
elements: Clipping window with boundaries xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax
Original line from P1(x1,y1) to P2(x2,y2)
Entering point E where line enters window
Exiting point L where line exits window
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how the line is clipped to the window boundaries

diagrams.title: Parameter u on Line Segment
diagrams.description: Shows the parameter u along the line segment with values from 0 to 1
elements: Markings at u=0 (start point), u=0.2 (clipped start), u=0.8 (clipped end), u=1 (end point)
diagrams.purpose: Understand how clipping corresponds to restricting the parameter range

diagrams.title: p and q Parameter Table
diagrams.description: Table showing p and q values for each clipping edge
elements: Four rows: LEFT, RIGHT, BOTTOM, TOP
For each: p value formula, q value formula
Visual indication of entering (p<0) vs exiting (p>0) edges
diagrams.purpose: Remember the formulas and edge classification

visuals.title: Liang Barsky Clipping
visuals.description: Visual diagram for liang barsky clipping
